name: input-group-icon
visual_summary: The input-group-icon component is a compact UI element that combines an input field with an icon, used for search, settings, or any form-related applications where instant feedback is essential. It typically consists of a text input box, an icon, and a subtle border, making it easily recognizable and accessible. A developer would use this component when requiring a concise way to collect user input while providing additional context through a corresponding icon.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group-icon
Description: The input-group-icon component is a compact UI element that combines an input field with an icon, used for search, settings, or any form-related applications where instant feedback is essential. It typically consists of a text input box, an icon, and a subtle border, making it easily recognizable and accessible. A developer would use this component when requiring a concise way to collect user input while providing additional context through a corresponding icon.
Style: flat, modern
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: form, input, icon, search, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
